messages: [Complaint] Double charge on invoice INV-1001 — please reverse the duplicate payment.
[Bug] Session expires every 10 minutes on Chrome 120 even with "remember me" checked.
[Query] Where can I find API rate limits for our Pro workspace?
[Suggestion] Add bulk export for tickets tagged "urgent" in the web console.
[Praise] The new search is fast — finding old threads finally takes seconds.
[Complaint] Refund for order #8806 still shows "pending" after 14 business days.
[Bug] PDF attachments fail to download on Android when file size exceeds 8MB.
[Query] Do you support SAML SSO with Azure AD for teams under 50 seats?
[Suggestion] Dark theme for the analytics dashboard would reduce eye strain.
[Praise] Support engineer Priya resolved my access issue in one email — amazing.
[Complaint] Marketing emails keep arriving after I toggled all notification preferences off.
[Bug] GraphQL query returns 500 when filtering by createdAt range crossing midnight UTC.
[Query] Can we migrate historical tickets from Zendesk without losing comment threads?
[Suggestion] Allow custom fields on the customer portal submission form.
[Praise] Release notes for v3.4 were detailed and actually matched what shipped.
[Complaint] Wrong tax rate applied to EU invoices — VAT should be 19% for DE.
[Bug] Infinite spinner on "Save draft" when title contains emoji characters.
[Query] What is the data retention policy for deleted user accounts under GDPR?
[Suggestion] Webhook retries with exponential backoff would reduce duplicate events.
[Praise] The mobile app offline cache saved us during last week's outage.
[Complaint] Account locked after three failed logins — no unlock link in the email body.
[Bug] Sorting by "Last updated" reverses order only on the second page of results.
[Query] Is two-factor authentication mandatory for admin roles only or all users?
[Suggestion] Pin important announcements at the top of the team feed.
[Praise] Documentation for webhooks finally includes working curl examples.
[Complaint] Shipping label printed with wrong return address for warehouse 1.
[Bug] Push notifications stop after app update until I reinstall from the store.
[Query] How do I transfer workspace ownership to another verified domain user?
[Suggestion] Add CSV import validation preview before committing rows.
[Praise] Uptime this quarter has been solid — appreciate the transparency page.
[Complaint] Loyalty points from November promo never credited to my account balance.
[Bug] Editor loses cursor position when pasting from Google Docs on Safari.
[Query] Can invoices be generated in multiple currencies per project?
[Suggestion] Role templates (Admin, Analyst, Viewer) would speed provisioning.
[Praise] The CLI tool is well documented —Rare for B2B products.
[Complaint] Chat queue wait time exceeded 45 minutes during peak — unacceptable SLA.
[Bug] Report scheduler sends duplicate emails if job runs past the hour boundary.
[Query] Where is the audit log for permission changes in the control plane?
[Suggestion] Let us brand the customer-facing status page with our logo.
[Praise] Your security whitepaper was thorough enough for our vendor review.
[Complaint] Guest checkout order 720041 missing confirmation email entirely.
[Bug] Tooltip overlays block clicks on action buttons in compact table mode.
[Query] Do you offer HIPAA BAA for the Enterprise tier in the US region?
[Suggestion] Snooze notifications until a specific date on mobile.
[Praise] The redesign reduced clicks to resolve a ticket — measurable win.
[Complaint] Annual renewal price increased without the 30-day notice promised in contract.
[Bug] Time zone dropdown shows duplicate "America/Chicago" entries.
[Query] How to revoke API keys for former contractors in bulk?
[Suggestion] Inline image thumbnails in comment threads would help triage.
[Praise] Fast response on the PCI questionnaire — thanks to the compliance team.
[Complaint] Unable to downgrade plan — "Contact sales" loops with no callback.
[Bug] Memory leak in desktop app when leaving the analytics tab open overnight.
[Query] What are the upload limits for video attachments on the Growth plan?
[Suggestion] Tag autocomplete from recent tags would reduce typos.
[Praise] Love the weekly digest email format — concise and actionable.
[Complaint] Fraudulent login attempt notification arrived 6 hours after the event.
[Bug] Emoji reactions not persisting if message edited within 5 seconds.
[Query] Can we whitelist IP ranges for admin API access only (not user traffic)?
[Suggestion] Export audit trail to Splunk-friendly JSON lines format.
[Praise] Your incident postmortems set a good example for our own ops team.
[Complaint] Gift card balance shows $0.00 despite purchase receipt from retailer.
[Bug] Nested bullet lists render with wrong indent on the customer portal.
[Query] Is there a sandbox environment mirroring production configuration?
[Suggestion] Optional CAPTCHA only after failed login attempts, not every time.
[Praise] The product roadmap blog posts feel honest about trade-offs.
[Complaint] Cancellation flow hid the "keep subscription" button below the fold.
[Bug] Locale es-MX shows dates in MM/DD instead of DD/MM in exports.
[Query] How long are backups retained for accidentally deleted projects?
[Suggestion] Keyboard navigate the command palette with arrow keys.
[Praise] Integration with Slack works better than Competitor X we migrated from.
[Complaint] Spam user reports flood our queue — need better auto-detection controls.
[Bug] Heatmap widget blank when dataset has exactly one data point.
[Query] Do you have a status page SLA for publishing incidents within N minutes?
[Suggestion] Template library for canned responses shared across teams.
[Praise] Accessibility improvements in the last release did not go unnoticed.
[Complaint] Currency conversion rate frozen at week-old values — caused budget errors.
[Bug] Drag-and-drop reorder intermittently drops items on Firefox 115.
[Query] Can data residency be pinned to eu-west-1 for all customer PII at signup?
[Suggestion] Color-blind safe palette option for charts (not only default rainbow).
[Praise] Support follow-up survey is short — actually filled it out for once.
[Complaint] Vendor portal login requires password reset every 7 days — too aggressive.
[Bug] Printed reports truncate footers on A4 when margins under 12mm.
[Query] Is there a formal exit process if we need to export all raw event logs?
[Suggestion] Allow "@here" mentions to respect user timezone quiet hours globally.
[Praise] Congrats on the SOC 2 Type II milestone — forwarded to our security team.
[Complaint] Kids account parental controls reset after parental device OS update.
[Bug] Collaboration cursor shows wrong user color when more than 8 editors present.
[Query] Minimum contract length if we add 5 seats mid-cycle to existing annual deal?
[Suggestion] Preview webhooks before saving endpoint URL with test payload.
[Praise] The sample data generator made our demo environment look credible.
[Complaint] Checkout error "payment_method_invalid" with valid corporate Amex card.
[Bug] Voice notes playback speed resets to 1x on lock screen resume.
[Query] Difference between "archived" and Soft-delete for compliance retention rules?
[Suggestion] Group similar automated alerts to reduce pager noise.
[Praise] Your engineer explained the caching bug without jargon — appreciated.
[Complaint] Freight damage claim rejected though photos were uploaded within 48h.
[Bug] SSO login redirects to localhost in staging when using custom domain.
[Query] Can we pause billing entirely during a documented maintenance window?
[Suggestion] Throttle auto-replies so customers do not get 3 emails in one minute.
[Praise] The in-app tours are skippable but still useful for new hires.
[Complaint] Algorithmic feed surfaces irrelevant content after following one new topic.
[Bug] Copy/paste from spreadsheet drops leading zeros in SKU column without warning.
[Query] File checksum verification available for large artifact downloads via CLI?
[Suggestion] "Undo send" window of 10s for outbound transactional emails optional.
